sections.paragraph:
πλάσις, εως, ἡ (πλάσσω; Theophr. et al.; pap; ApcEsdr 2:23 p. 26, 16 Tdf. τὴν σὴν πλάσιν; Ath. 25:4 τῇ κατὰ τὴν πλάσιν διαθέσει) the forming of someth. by shaping a soft substance, formation, molding, creation (w. gen. Polyb. 6, 53, 5; Plut., Cic. 862 [4, 4]; PSI 712, 5 πλάσις ὀπτῆς πλίνθου) ἡ πλ. τοῦ Ἀδάμ B 6:9. τὴν πλ. τὴν τῶν ἀνθρώπων AcPlCor 1:13. δευτέρα πλ. of the spiritual new creation through Christ B 6:13 (cp. Diod S 1, 16, 1).—DELG s.v. πλάσσω.

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

ApcEsdr ApcEsdr = Apocalypse of Esdras—List 2

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

gen. gen. = genitive

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

AcPlCor AcPlCor = Acts of Paul: correspondence with Corinthians (a.k.a. Third Corinthians), text according to PBodmer X—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 822
